name: Hell Hound

traits.name: Demonic Restoration
traits.text: If the hezrou dies outside the Abyss, its body dissolves into ichor, and it gains a new body instantly, reviving with all its Hit Points somewhere in the Abyss.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The hezrou has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Stench
traits.text: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 16, any creature that starts its turn in a 10-foot Emanation originating from the hezrou. Failure: The target has the Poisoned condition until the start of its next turn.

text:
# Hell Hound

*Large Fiend (Demon), Chaotic Evil*

### Actions

**Rend.** Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Poison damage.
